reasoning: The F1-c interface serves as the critical control plane link between the O-CU and O-DU. A latency spike on the control plane logically precedes and causes symptomatic failures in the user plane (F1-u) and the management interfaces (E2, A1).
actionable_steps: 1. Perform a trace on the transport network between the O-CU and O-DU to identify sources of jitter or congestion. 2. Verify the health of the network switches and routers handling F1-c traffic. 3. Evaluate and optimize the signaling timers on the O-CU and O-DU to mitigate the impact of the latency spike.
